w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Block URL credentials and non-443 port
Browsers already enforce same-origin policies and sandboxing.
A client-side app cannot arbitrarily reach into private networks unless the user themselves is on that network and explicitly accesses those addresses.
don’t need to worry about blocking private/local/intranet hosts. That protection only becomes critical if
a backend that processes user-supplied URLs or proxies requests.
Remote import timeout and max size cap
Paste is converted to text, blur sanitizes title
ZIP bomb/decompression bomb guard beyond file-size cap
Zip size is capped, but decompressed expansion risk remains during parsing
Vendor supply-chain integrity checks/ Supply-chain integrity controls (vendor checksum/CI integrity monitoring)
Local vendor with checksum gate/signature verification is implemented
Now implemented in meta tag / prepared in web config
To be implemented during IIS deployment

It is prepared in config and will be active after ISS deployment
To be implemented during IIS deployment
meta tag and must be set as
It is prepared in config and will be active after ISS deployment

repared in config and will be active after ISS deployment
